name: Ambow Education Holding Ltd.
business: Ambow Education Holding Ltd. provides AI-powered phygital solutions, including the HybriU platform for education, conferencing, and events, and operates NewSchool of Architecture & Design. It sells to educational institutions, corporations, and event organizers.

exposures.sentence: At the core of this mission is HybriU, a cutting-edge platform that transforms education, corporate conferencing and live events by delivering immersive, intelligent and real-time experiences across industries.
